note: block_visibility_groups_admin is the optional UI-helper submodule of block_visibility_groups. It defines a ConditionCreator plugin type and a 'create a group from the current page' form; it declares no permissions, config or config schema. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded): they probe documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site using block_visibility_groups_admin, what plugin type does this submodule define, and in which src namespace/directory do implementations live? Name the manager service too.
evals.expected_output: It defines the ConditionCreator plugin type; plugins live in Plugin/ConditionCreator (src/Plugin/ConditionCreator/), discovered by the plugin.manager.block_visibility_groups_admin.condition_creator manager (a DefaultPluginManager) using the @ConditionCreator annotation.

evals.prompt: I want to add my own guided condition builder to block_visibility_groups_admin. What class do I extend, what annotation do I use, and which annotation property ties it to a core Condition plugin?
evals.expected_output: Extend ConditionCreatorBase (implementing ConditionCreatorInterface), annotate with @ConditionCreator(id, label, condition_plugin) where condition_plugin is the id of the core Condition plugin the creator produces config for, and place it in src/Plugin/ConditionCreator/.

evals.prompt: Which ConditionCreator plugins ship with block_visibility_groups_admin, and which core Condition plugin does each wrap?
evals.expected_output: Three: route (wraps core request_path), roles (wraps user_role), node_type (wraps node_type).

evals.prompt: In block_visibility_groups_admin, which form/route creates a new block visibility group from the current page, and what does it do on submit?
evals.expected_output: ConditionCreatorForm at route block_visibility_groups_admin.group_create (/admin/structure/block/block-visibility-group-new/{route_name}/{parameters}); on submit it creates a BlockVisibilityGroup, addCondition()s each selected condition config, and redirects to the group's edit form.

evals.prompt: How does block_visibility_groups_admin relate to block_visibility_groups, and what does it depend on?
evals.expected_output: It is the optional UI/authoring helper layer on top of the base block_visibility_groups module (an 'development helper'); its info.yml depends only on block_visibility_groups:block_visibility_groups and it adds no config, permissions or schema of its own.

evals.prompt: What permission is needed to create a block visibility group via block_visibility_groups_admin's form, and does the submodule define any permissions of its own?
evals.expected_output: The core 'administer blocks' permission gates the group_create form; the submodule defines no permissions of its own (the active-group list route only needs core 'access content').

evals.prompt: When instantiating a ConditionCreator plugin from block_visibility_groups_admin's manager in code, what configuration key is required and what happens if it is missing?
evals.expected_output: createInstance() requires a 'route_name' in configuration; the manager resolves it into a RouteMatch under the 'route' key, and throws an \Exception if route_name is missing.
